name: Page Scraper
description: Fetch HTML pages and extract text content from validated URLs

options.name: request_timeout
options.label: Request timeout (ms)
options.description: HTTP request timeout per URL in milliseconds.

options.name: max_content_length
options.label: Max extracted text (chars)
options.description: Truncate extracted text to this many characters. Applied after HTML stripping.

options.name: delay_between_requests
options.label: Delay between requests (ms)
options.description: Total delay budget spread across workers. With 8 workers and 500ms delay, each worker waits ~62ms between requests.

options.name: concurrency
options.label: Concurrent requests
options.description: Number of URLs to fetch simultaneously. Higher = faster but may trigger rate limiting. 8 is a good balance.

options.name: skip_non_html
options.label: Skip non-HTML responses
options.description: Mark non-HTML content types (PDF, images) as 'skipped' instead of 'error'.

options.name: extract_meta
options.label: Extract meta description
options.description: Extract meta description tag from HTML head.
